cleavage agent: All samples were digested with trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI, USA)
fragmentation method: 0.5 Da was chosen for CID fragment ions for peptide identification.
instrument: the proteins were analyzed by 1D-LC-MS/MS using an LTQ-Orbitrap mass analyzer
labeling: the protein composition in EVs from A. castellanii was identified and quantified by LC-MS/MS analysis.
reduction reagent: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol (Merck, Darmstadt, Germany)
